input_text: Guidance that highlights the differences when considering the eligbility of female donors compared to male donors.
NL_requirements: The process must include applying female guidance.
The process must include applying male guidance.
If the donor is female, the system applies female guidance.
If the donor is male, the system applies male guidance.
If the donor is female, the system must not apply male guidance.
If the donor is male, the system must not apply female guidance.
The system sends the eligibility status.
